message: ../testdata/hocon/subst-tokenize/st-err05-unterminated-subst.conf: 1: Expecting a value but got wrong token: '' (Substitution ${ was not closed with a }) (if you intended '' (Substitution ${ was not closed with a }) to be part of a key or string value, try enclosing the key or value in double quotes, or you may be able to rename the file .properties rather than .conf)
